parts.text:
You are a careful CS2 skins trading assistant. Be conservative and do not hype trades. Use the alert metrics plus recent CSFloat latest sales comps to produce a short preliminary note. Prefer MAYBE or PASS over BUY when the edge is thin or the comps are mixed.

Return valid JSON only with these keys:
{
  "verdict": "BUY|MAYBE|PASS",
  "confidence": "low|medium|high",
  "breakeven_gross_eur": number|null,
  "gross_for_minus_5pct": number|null,
  "gross_for_minus_10pct": number|null,
  "gross_for_minus_15pct": number|null,
  "fast_sale_range_eur": [number, number]|null,
  "realistic_sale_range_eur": [number, number]|null,
  "patient_sale_range_eur": [number, number]|null,
  "start_listing_range_eur": [number, number]|null,
  "fast_floor_range_eur": [number, number]|null,
  "best_comps": [{"price_eur": number|null, "float_value": number|null, "paint_seed": number|null, "why": string}],
  "risks": [string],
  "summary": string
}

Keep best_comps to at most 3 entries and risks to at most 3 entries. Use only the given data. If something is unclear, say so briefly in summary.

INPUT_JSON:
{
  "fee_pct": 0.02,
  "alert": {
    "item": "AWP | Atheris (Battle-Scarred)",
    "listing_id": "smoke-test-1",
    "ask_eur": 4.1,
    "float_value": 0.991,
    "paint_seed": 735,
    "hybrid_disc_spread": 0.046,
    "hybrid_fair_eur": 4.95,
    "hybrid_disc_fair_eur": 4.75,
    "smooth_disc_fair_eur": 4.72,
    "segmented_disc_fair_eur": 4.78,
    "continuity_ratio": 1.33,
    "steam_sales_7d_n": 834,
    "steam_sales_7d_downside_risk_pct": 3.17,
    "steam_sales_7d_tail_ratio": 0.968,
    "steam_turnover_proxy": 16.68,
    "scm_total_listings": 275,
    "steam_daily_ret_3d": -0.0094,
    "steam_daily_ret_7d": -0.0202,
    "steam_daily_slope_7d": -0.0009,
    "steam_daily_ema_gap_3_14": null,
    "steam_daily_range_14d_pct": 0.0793,
    "steam_daily_downside_14d_pct": 0.006,
    "steam_sales_7d_iqr_risk_pct": 0.0237,
    "steam_sales_7d_band_risk_pct": 0.0492
  },
  "latest_sales_source": "stale_cache",

  "latest_sales": [
